description.value:
A smooth, dark stone the size of a clenched fist, worn perfectly round by what seems like centuries of water. It has a faintly metallic smell and a weight that seems slightly more than it should.

Curse. The stone is magnetically cursed. Metal items in the same pack as the stone occasionally rattle and shift, sometimes locking together. Each time the carrier draws a weapon from a sheath or pack, they must make a DC 10 Dexterity check or the draw takes an additional action. The effect is subtle - it takes 1d6 days of carrying it before the issue becomes obvious.

unidentified.description: A smooth, dark stone. Heavier than it looks. Faintly metallic smell - probably iron content in the rock.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: A smooth, dense stone. Possibly decorative or a curiosity.
cursedMeta.trueNature: Weapons drawing from same pack: DC 10 Dex or costs extra action. Effect delayed 1d6 days.

curse.name: The Binding Stone
curse.description: Metal gear in the same container shifts and binds. Each time the carrier draws a weapon from a sheath or pack shared with the stone they make a DC 10 Dexterity check or the draw costs an additional action.

hints: Coins and nails in the same pack occasionally kiss with a faint click overnight.

escalation.effect: Minor rattling in the pack that stops when opened.
